ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutes" (
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institute */,
  "institute_name" TEXT /* Name of the institute */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institute */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the institute */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the institute was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the institute's website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the institute */,
  "total_staff" INTEGER /* Total number of staff members */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "subject_description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the subject */,
  "course_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the subject in weeks or months */,
  "subject_level" TEXT /* Level of the subject (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available at the location */,
  "rental_contact" TEXT /* Contact person for rental inquiries */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status of the location (e.g., available, booked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the trainer */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Qualification of the trainer */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the trainer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the trainer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the trainer */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* List of certifications the trainer holds */,
  "specializations" TEXT /* Areas of specialization */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status of the trainer (e.g., available, busy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses_track" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tracking record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the enrolled course */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who enrolled in the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the student */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the student */,
  "completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course has been completed (0=No, 1=Yes) */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the course was completed */,
  "attendance" REAL /* Attendance percentage of the student */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staffs" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the staff member */,
  "salary" REAL /* Monthly salary of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the staff member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the staff member */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_premises" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the rental */,
  "rental_cost" REAL /* Cost to rent the premises */,
  "rental_terms" TEXT /* Terms of rental agreement */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the rental agreement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the rental agreement */,
  "rental_contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for rental inquiries */,
  "rental_contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for rental inquiries */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of maintenance (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_premises_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
